charity.s: $12M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.19% of revenue). Drucker Institute Management Top 250 — ranked #88 (2024) on customer satisfaction, employee engagement, innovation, social responsibility, and financial strength.

wiki.extract: Hyatt Hotels Corporation, commonly known as Hyatt Hotels & Resorts, is an American multinational hospitality company headquartered in the Riverside Plaza area of Chicago that manages and franchises luxury and business hotels, resorts, and vacation properties. Hyatt Hotels & Resorts is one of the businesses managed by the Pritzker family. Hyatt has more than 1350 hotels and all-inclusive properties in 69 countries, across North America, South America, Europe, Asia, Africa and Australia.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was walking when they slipped on a kitchen floor and sustained a fractured right femur requiring hospitalization.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On March 1, 2025, an employee was retrieving food from the kitchen when they tripped on a non-slip floor mat and fell. The employee sustained a concussion.

sampleRecords.employer: Hyatt Regency Clearwater Beach Resort And Spa
sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to tripping, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee walked between two tables to close an oven when she tripped and fell, resulting in a right hip injury.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level less than 6 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was standing on a chair with rollers to reach an item when he fell approximately 3 feet to the ground. The employee was hospitalized with a broken right knee and an ankle injury.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slipping
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee slipped on water and fell to a ballroom floor. He landed on his arm and his shoulder was dislocated.
